headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Lorde criticized AI glasses during her Madrid festival performance. She likely targeted festival sponsor Ray-Ban's Meta AI smartglasses. Lorde found the concept of the glasses "not sexy."

headline: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
summary: Matmos member Drew Daniel, as The Soft Pink Truth, released a new album. The album is described as hypnotic, healing, and hopeful. Daniel is known for his prolific solo work and production credits.

headline: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
summary: Apple's self-driving car project never fully launched. The program's need for powerful AI led to advanced chip development. These AI chips are now a core strength of Apple's silicon.

headline: One of SteelSeries’ best gaming headsets is over $100 off
summary: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset is on sale for $239.99. This deal saves buyers over $100 compared to other retailers. Both Xbox and PlayStation versions are available and support multiple platforms.

headline: Best Tech Deals Today: AR Glasses, Switch 2 Camera, AirPods Pro 3
summary: Find top deals on RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR Glasses. Discover sales for the Nintendo Switch 2 Camera and Apple AirPods Pro 3. This article highlights various tech deals for today.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Support Crossplay Between PS4 and PS5, Activision Confirms
summary: Activision clarified crossplay support for Black Ops 1 and 2. Both games now allow cross-platform play between PS4 and PS5. This confirmation follows player confusion regarding the feature.

headline: Kevin Feige Teases Appearance from Florence Pugh as Yelena Belova in Spider-Man: Brand New Day
summary: Marvel's Kevin Feige hinted at a major character appearance. Florence Pugh's Yelena Belova may feature in the new Spider-Man movie. This crossover builds excitement for 'Brand New Day.'

headline: Avengers: Doomsday Concept Art Reveals First Look at More Than 20 Returning Heroes
summary: New concept art for Avengers: Doomsday has been released. It showcases a first look at over 20 returning Marvel heroes. Key characters like Cyclops, Mister Fantastic, and Doctor Doom are featured.

headline: No political motive in Widdecombe killing after new arrest, police say
summary: Police have made a new arrest in the Widdecombe killing. A 28-year-old man was apprehended in Rotherham. Authorities state there is no indication of a political motive.

headline: Sinner defends Wimbledon title, beating Zverev
summary: Jannik Sinner secured his second consecutive Wimbledon men's singles title. He defeated Alexander Zverev in a hard-fought match. Sinner's victory solidifies his status as the world's top player.

headline: Tragic Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27
summary: A devastating fire erupted at a bar in Bangkok's Chatuchak district. At least 27 people have tragically lost their lives. Patrons were seen fleeing through intense flames to escape.

headline: Kane defends Tuchel, insists England can reach 'another level'
summary: England captain Harry Kane supports coach Thomas Tuchel amidst frustration. Kane believes the team possesses untapped potential. England aims to win their first World Cup since 1966.
